title: agrostis alba subsp. coarctata
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. coarctata, also known as bent grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Agrostis alba subsp. coarctata include its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritations, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress and cell damage. Agrostis alba subsp. coarctata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
